<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis\TDigest; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; /** * @see https://redis.io/commands/tdigest.byrank/ * * Returns, for each input rank, an estimation of the value (floating-point) with that rank. */ class TDIGESTBYRANK extends RedisCommand { public function getId() { return 'TDIGEST.BYRANK'; } /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function parseResponse($data) { if (!is_array($data)) { return $data; } // convert Relay (RESP3) constants to strings return array_map(function ($value) { if (is_string($value) || !is_float($value)) { return $value; } if (is_nan($value)) { return 'nan'; } switch ($value) { case INF: return 'inf'; case -INF: return '-inf'; default: return $value; } }, $data); } }
